input.placeholder: Ask Aminah anything about your books...
input.disclaimer: Aminah can make mistakes. Always verify critical numbers.

empty_state.title: Hi, I'm Aminah
empty_state.subtitle: I can help you understand your financials, spot issues, and answer questions about your books.
empty_state.simple_subtitle: Ask me anything about your business.
empty_state.example_1: What's my cash position this month?
empty_state.example_2: How are we doing vs budget?
empty_state.example_3: Is there anything I should worry about?

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.session_lost: Your session was lost. Starting a new one.

owner.greeting: Hi Tarek. What can I help you understand?
owner.q3: Walk me through the close progress
owner.q4: Why is marketing over budget again?

cfo.greeting: Hi. What are we working on?
cfo.q1: What needs my attention right now?

junior.greeting: Hi Sara. How can I help with your work?
junior.q1: What should I work on next?

missed_recurrences.title: Missing recurrences
missed_recurrences.fx_unavailable_tooltip: FX rate unavailable for {{currency}}; severity cannot be computed

cross_tenant_context.title: Cross-tenant context
cross_tenant_context.below_threshold_explanation: A minimum of 3 tenants must share this merchant before aggregate insight is available (privacy safeguard).

suspend_modal.title: Suspend recurrence pattern?
suspend_modal.subtitle: This will hide {{merchant}} from future detection until reactivated.
suspend_modal.reason_placeholder: Briefly describe why this pattern should stop emitting alerts (e.g. vendor change, lease ended, contract renegotiated)…
suspend_modal.suspend_failed: Could not suspend this pattern. Please try again.

dismiss_modal.title: Dismiss this alert?
dismiss_modal.body: This is critical — it won't resurface after dismissal. Are you sure?

errors.owner_only: Only the Owner can dismiss advisor alerts.
errors.confirm_failed: Could not confirm — the JE gateway rejected the entry. Nothing was posted.
errors.defer_failed: Could not defer this alert. Please try again.
errors.dismiss_failed: Could not dismiss this alert. Please try again.
errors.acknowledge_failed: Entry was posted but the alert could not be cleared. It will resurface.
